conversion.Description: When a new lead is added to HubSpot, trigger a 3-email nurture sequence and auto-schedule a discovery call via Calendly.
conversion.ZapTemplate: HubSpot New Contact → Gmail Send Email → Calendly Create Invite

conversion.Description: When a proposal is sent (HubSpot deal stage update), auto-trigger an SMS follow-up via Twilio within 2 hours and log response status to Google Sheets.
conversion.ZapTemplate: HubSpot Deal Stage Change → Twilio Send SMS → Google Sheets Log Row

conversion.Description: When a lead goes cold (no activity for 5 days), create a Slack reminder for the owner and add a follow-up task to Google Calendar.
conversion.ZapTemplate: HubSpot Inactive Contact → Slack Send Message → Google Calendar Create Event

lead_gen.Description: When a Facebook/Instagram Lead Ad form is submitted, append lead data to Google Sheets and create a new HubSpot contact instantly.
lead_gen.ZapTemplate: Facebook Lead Ads New Lead → Google Sheets Append Row → HubSpot Create Contact

lead_gen.Description: When a Typeform intake form is submitted, create a HubSpot deal, assign to owner, and send a personalized confirmation email via Gmail.
lead_gen.ZapTemplate: Typeform New Entry → HubSpot Create Deal → Gmail Send Email

lead_gen.Description: When a LinkedIn Lead Gen form is submitted, add the contact to a Mailchimp audience segment and create a HubSpot contact for CRM tracking.
lead_gen.ZapTemplate: LinkedIn Lead Gen Forms New Lead → Mailchimp Add Subscriber → HubSpot Create Contact

retention.Description: When a Stripe invoice is created, auto-sync to QuickBooks and send a branded payment reminder email via Gmail 3 days before due date.
retention.ZapTemplate: Stripe New Invoice → QuickBooks Create Invoice → Gmail Send Email

retention.Description: When a client contract renewal is within 30 days (HubSpot deal close date), trigger a Slack alert to owner and log to a Renewal Tracker sheet.
retention.ZapTemplate: HubSpot Deal Upcoming Close Date → Slack Send Message → Google Sheets Append Row

retention.Description: When a Stripe subscription is cancelled or payment fails, flag the HubSpot contact as 'At-Risk' and auto-send a win-back email within 1 hour.
retention.ZapTemplate: Stripe Cancelled Subscription → HubSpot Update Contact → Gmail Send Email
